Managed Video Editing Services for Teams That
Need More Content
Out the Door

Get a dedicated video editing team for all your social video needs. We handle the editors, project management, quality checks, and turnaround, so your team can publish more.

Launch in 7 Days48-Hour Standard Turnaround80% Cost Savings

Trusted by 36+ B2B companies generating $50M+ in revenue

You're Facing the Same Bottleneck That
35+ Agencies Already Solved

The Capacity Trap

Your Clients Want More Video

Video demand is outpacing your team’s capacity by 3x. Every project you turn down is revenue walking out the door.

Every hour spent editing is an hour NOT spent on strategy, client relationships, or growth.

The Hiring Nightmare

Hiring a Full-Time Editor Costs More Than You Think

A full-time video editor in North America runs $6,500+/month with benefits, taxes, and overhead. Then there’s the 3-month ramp-up before they’re productive.

That’s $20K+ spent before your first real deliverable.

The Freelancer Problem

Freelancers Are Unreliable at Scale

Ghosting before deadlines. Inconsistent quality. Different styles on every project. You spend 10+ hours per week managing people who should be managing themselves.

You didn’t start an agency to become a freelance project manager.

Stop Choosing Between Speed, Cost, and Quality
Get All Three

We recruit the top 1% of offshore video editors with agency experience, strong portfolios, and clear communication skills. Then we manage the workflow, deadlines, and quality checks, so you get reliable output without managing another team.

Agency-Grade Output Without Agency-Level Overhead

Dedicated team with proven workflows refined across 35+ agency partnerships. Quality guarantees with built-in revision rounds.

Live in 7 Days, Not 7 Months

24-hour talent matching based on your niche. Onboarding call within 48 hours. First deliverables by end of week one.

Lower Overhead Than Hiring In-House

Get reliable editing capacity without payroll, benefits, recruiting delays, or full-time headcount commitments.

Managed Team, Zero Management

Your dedicated project manager owns briefs, deadlines, quality checks, and delivery coordination. You stay focused on content strategy and client relationships.

Video Editing Services Built for
High-Volume Content Teams

Need more videos without adding another full-time hire? Get Levrg gives you a managed video editing team that can support recurring content production across social, YouTube, paid media, sales enablement, and client campaigns.

Get Levrg gives you a professional video team that can support:

Short-form video editing for Reels, Shorts, and TikTok
Long-form YouTube and podcast editing
B2B product demo videos
Social media video production
Motion graphics and branded video assets
White label video editing for agencies
Ongoing video editing support for marketing teams

You bring the content goals. We bring the editors, workflow, project management, and production rhythm to keep publishing consistent.

The Tools We Use to Edit Your Videos

Professional-grade editing software combined with AI-powered tools for speed without sacrificing quality.

  • Adobe Creative Cloud full suite
  • AI-powered editing & caption tools
  • Professional motion graphics & VFX
  • Collaborative review & approval workflows

Not Another Freelancer Marketplace
This Is Your Dedicated Team

Proven Track Record

35+ agencies trust us with their video output. We’ve delivered thousands of edits with a 98% satisfaction rate.

Direct Communication

Your dedicated PM is a Slack message away. No ticket queues, no offshore call centers real humans, real time.

Vetted Talent Only

Every editor passes a rigorous portfolio review, skills test, and English fluency check. We hire less than 1% of applicants.

Built for Scale

Start with one editor. Scale to a full team. Same workflow, same PM, same quality just more capacity when you need it.

Your dedicated video editing team is one form away. Get custom pricing and a proposed team structure in 24 hours.
